title.en: BRAKES SPECIALLY ADAPTED FOR CYCLES

definition.ko: (1) 이 서브클래스는 단지 자전차에 특유한 제동장치 및 작동 기구를 포함한다 . (2) 이 서브클래스는 자전차용만으로서 기술되어 있거나 또는 주장되어 있는 것에 관계없이 좀더 광범위한 용도를 갖는 제동장치 또는 제동기구는 일반형으로 간주하고 포함하지 않는다. 그러한 것들을 서브클래스 B60T 또는 클래스 F16 과 관련된 서브클래스내에 포함된다

title.en: Brakes; Arrangements thereof (back-pedalling brakes B62L0005000000)
in which cycle wheels are engaged by brake elements
the tyre surfaces being engaged
the wheel-rim being engaged
by the elements moving radially relative to the wheel
by the elements moving substantially parallel to the wheel axis
the elements being mounted on levers pivotable about a common axis
the elements being mounted on levers pivotable about different axes
the axes being located intermediate the ends of the levers

title.ko: 제동 작동 기구(역 페달링 제동 장치의 작동기구 B62L 5/00 ; 보오덴 기구 F16C 1/10) 그 배치
title.en: Brake-actuating mechanisms (actuating mechanisms for back-pedalling brakes B62L0005000000;Bowden mechanisms F16C0001100000); Arrangements thereof

title.ko: 핸드 레버에 의한 제어용의 것(일반적인 자전차의 제어용 핸드 레버 B62K 23/06)
title.en: for control by a hand lever (hand levers for control of cycles in general B62K0023060000)

title.ko: 발 레버에 의한 제어용의 것(일반적인 자전차의 제어용 발 레버 B62K 23/08)
title.en: for control by a foot lever (foot levers for control of cycles in general B62K0023080000)

title.ko: 작동 기구의 로킹 장치(자전차의 제어장치를 직접 쇄정하는 것 B62H 5/18)
title.en: Means for locking the actuating mechanisms (locking a cycle braking device directly B62H0005180000)
Mechanisms specially adapted for braking more than one wheel

title.ko: 역 페달링으로 제어되는 제동기 그 작동 기구(자전차용에 특히 적합한 프리휘일 장치 F16D 41/00 )
title.en: Brakes, or actuating mechanisms therefor, controlled by back-pedalling (free-wheel devices specially adapted for cycles F16D0041000000)
the brakes being actuated through coacting coaxial cones
the brakes being of expanding-brake-bushing type
the brakes being of disc type
the brakes being of shoe type
the brakes being actuated through coacting cams and balls or rollers
the brakes being of expanding-brake-bushing type
the brakes being of disc type
the brakes being of shoe type
the brakes being additionally controlled by alternative means
the brakes having adjustable braking power
